title: Origins: Chinese Zodiac
description: The Twelve Chinese Zodiac has arrive Minecraft as Origins Classes.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod. You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in 1.10.0 of origin, so for other versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

# Chinese Zodiac Class

The Twelve Chinese Zodiac has arrive Minecraft as Origins Classes.

## Chinese Zodiac Class List

![Rat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b465cfbefc2a8bd6f7c53ca79f4b577351804c52.png)|![Cow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29c2ecad5b99cf59343ef62816b33277475a00d3.png)|![Tiger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86dfe9a7d42df65c605cf56340742aa22595efc4.png)|![Rabbit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2820db71ed029ff248f16fbbe168ed4799002fa6.png)
-|-|-|-

![Dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5475a22d33a42fea53606b278e680ab3c38b543c.png)|![Snake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5168bf6907842ddb4bd0cbc73378521d74095c99.png)|![Horse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c126dcf349453d50c112c31684968d9139d12785.png)|![Sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3993a622f1c3250440f1ea14807259f38eb86aa.png)
-|-|-|-

![Monkey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2c31b9eef7ef11edd1e360ffe7e46cd16aabee5.png)|![Chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63f1d5e6d1049e809b146471609f550c4da5b8ce.png)|![Dog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72abc8885e393e0ef3d038fcedc58188711899a7.png)|![Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c09fcb5e5de81c6f1099ec54cce94a62157a292.png)
-|-|-|-


<details>
<summary>子鼠 Rat</summary>

###  Blessed by the spirit of the Rat, the first of the Chinese Zodiac. Known for wit, adaptability, and resourcefulness, you thrive in cities and find opportunities where others see obstacles. However, you are smaller and weaker than most, needing to rely on your cunning to survive.


- 🏃‍♀️ **Urban Adaptation**
  - You are naturally attuned to urban environments, moving with increased speed and agility.
- 🏃‍♀️ **Nimble Escape**
  - You can squeeze through small spaces and gain a burst of speed to evade danger.
- 🍀 **Resourceful Scavenger**
  - You have a knack for finding useful items in discarded resources. You have a luck effect when near chests, barrels, and loot crates.
- 🤕 **Small Build**
  - Being a small build makes you more weak and hungry. You take no fall damage.
- ✨ **Zodiac Power**
  - You have particles around.
![Rat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7Wm0608/images/b81ddda8191142ce6f5e61f3b1e5c21e8e9b34dd.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>丑牛 Ox</summary>

###  Granted the strength and resilience of the zodiac's Ox, you possess unwavering determination and a connection to the earth. Your diligence allows you to overcome obstacles with steadfast resolve.


- 💪 **Earthbound Strength**
  - Your connection to the earth grants you immense physical strength and resistance to knockback while on the ground.
- 💪 **Steady Stamina**
  - You possess incredible stamina and are resistant to exhaustion. You can work tirelessly without tiring easily.
- 🐢 **Plodding Pace**
  - Your steady, determined nature makes you less agile in the water. Swimming speed is significantly reduced.
- 🧱 **Hard Labor**
  - Breaking blocks requires more effort as your strength is more suited to enduring rather than immediate destruction.
- 🛡️ **Stubborn Resolve**
  - Gain temporary resistance when taking damage. Can only trigger this again after 30 seconds.
- ✨ **Zodiac Power**
  - You have particles around.
![Ox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7Wm0608/images/2324e4767a7b1aa366c0ccb05ac320ed5186c993.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>寅虎 Tiger</summary>

###  Blessed by the Jade Emperor with the spirit of the tiger, you possess immense strength, courage, and a touch of arrogance. But beware, the world sees you as a threat, and your bold nature can lead to recklessness. 


- 💪 **Tiger's Strength**
  - You possess incredible physical strength, dealing significantly more melee damage.
- 💥 **Fearless Roar**
  - Unleash a deafening roar that weakens nearby enemies, inflicting Slowness for a short duration.
- 🕵️‍♂️ **Prowling Hunter**
  - Gain increased movement speed and night vision while sneaking, allowing you to stalk your prey effectively.
- 👁️ **Cat's Eyes**
  - Grants the user night vision.
- 😬 **Arrogance**
  - You take increased damage from ranged attacks. Your pride makes you underestimate your foes.
- ✨ **Zodiac Power**
  - You have particles around.
![Tiger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7Wm0608/images/1ef9dcaf9b485cf3a57761cf233862208095dd53.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>卯兔 Rabbit</summary>

###  Blessed by Chang'e, the moon goddess, you embody the qualities of the Rabbit in the Chinese Zodiac: gentle, kind, and skilled in herbalism and lunar magic. You are at peace in the moonlight and possess a natural affinity for plants and healing. 


- 🚀 **Lunar Grace**
  - Gain increased speed and jump boost during the night.
- 🌙 **Moonlit Healing**
  - Regenerate health faster under the moonlight.
- 🛡️ **Chang'e's Blessing**
  - You have a natural resistance to fall damage.
- 😱 **Night Blindness**
  - You are easily spooked in the dark. You gain Night Vision.
- ✨ **Zodiac Power**
  - You have particles around.
![Rabbit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7Wm0608/images/86aabcb2e82cbd68d8cccc5024165d40c1e695c0.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>辰龍 Dragon</summary>

###  Blessed by the Jade Emperor with the might and majesty of the dragon, you are a powerful and auspicious being. However, your pride and ambition can lead to challenges.


- 🔥 **Dragon's Breath**
  - Unleash the dragon fire!
- 💨 **Celestial Flight**
  - Fly like the wind!
- 🛡️ **Dragon Scales**
  - Your skin is incredibly tough, providing natural armor.
- 🍀 **Auspicious Presence**
  - Your very presence brings good fortune, increasing the chance of rare drops.
- 🚀 **Weakened Grounded**
  - Dragons are creatures of the sky, being confined to the ground is not your preference. You move slightly slower.
- 🔥 **Prideful Sleep**
  - Sleeping in a bed is difficult for a dragon. The bed feels awkward and is quickly destroyed.
- ✨ **Zodiac Power**
  - You have particles around.
![Dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7Wm0608/images/ff11b1ded1056affabdffbd36d749ef32dcc9a84.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>巳蛇 Snake</summary>

###  Born under the sign of the Snake, you possess cunning, wisdom, and a deep connection to the earth. You are resourceful and possess a natural affinity for shadows and hidden paths. However, you may be perceived as secretive and prone to manipulation.


- 👁️ **Serpent's Sight**
  - Enhanced vision, allowing you to see clearly in caves and at night.
- 🏃‍♀️ **Shed Skin**
  - Once every Minecraft day, you can shed your skin, granting a temporary boost to speed and agility.
- 💀 **Venomous Bite**
  - Your attacks have a chance to inflict poison on your enemies.
- ⬇️ **Earthbound**
  - You are more comfortable on the ground and are less effective in the air.
- 🥶 **Cold Blooded**
  - You are vulnerable to extreme cold. The Wither effect drains you if you are in snow biome.
- ✨ **Zodiac Power**
  - You have particles around.
![Snake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7Wm0608/images/f9bcaeb845707290f4e830adb08f2cbf2250cb07.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>午馬 Horse</summary>

###  Blessed by the spirit of the Horse, you are swift, energetic, and possess a natural talent for leadership. However, your independent spirit may sometimes lead to restlessness and a reluctance to follow the crowd.


- 🚀 **Swift Steed**
  - Your base movement speed is significantly increased.
- 💨 **Untamed Spirit**
  - Gain a burst of speed when sprinting, but experience exhaustion shortly after.
- 🚀 **Leaping Gait**
  - You can jump higher than other players.
- 🐌 **Restless Heart**
  - You need less sleep than other players, reducing Phantom spawn chances. However, staying in one place for too long causes Slowness.
- 🤕 **Fragile Hooves**
  - You take slightly increased fall damage.
- ✨ **Zodiac Power**
  - You have particles around.
![Horse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7Wm0608/images/0d90cabbdfd0546c63948208e46924f9f47d194a.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>未羊 Sheep</summary>

###  Blessed by the celestial Sheep, you embody compassion, artistry, and a touch of mischievousness. Your connection to the earth grants you unusual resilience, but you may find confrontation difficult.


- 🌿 **Herbal Remedy**
  - You have an innate understanding of herbs and plants. Consuming any plant grants enhanced healing.
- 🛡️ **Earthen Fortitude**
  - Your connection to the earth gives you resistance to all damage.
- 🌱 **Pastoral Affinity**
  - Grants increased movement speed on grassy and floral terrain.
- 📉 **Weak Punches**
  - Deals less damage by 25% to entities
- ✨ **Zodiac Power**
  - You have particles around.
![Sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7Wm0608/images/a99a34a7f55f24cfe14fe112ee3ed9ff7f62ba4c.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>申猴 Monkey</summary>

###  Blessed by the spirit of the Monkey, you possess incredible agility and a mischievous nature. You excel in climbing and swift movement, but your playful tendencies can sometimes lead to trouble.


- 🧗‍♀️ **Nimble Climber**
  - You are incredibly adept at climbing, scaling even the smoothest surfaces with ease.
- 🤸‍♀️ **Acrobatic Leap**
  - Your innate agility allows you to perform powerful jumps and aerial maneuvers.
- 🚀 **Swift Footwork**
  - You are naturally faster than most, allowing you to move quickly across the land.
- 🤕 **Fragile Limbs**
  - Your agility comes at a cost. You are more susceptible to fall damage.
- 😩 **Easily Distracted**
  - You find it difficult to focus for extended periods. Experience gain is reduced.
- ✨ **Zodiac Power**
  - You have particles around.
![Monkey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7Wm0608/images/8c948b71e5bb69dccc41eca615819dbad5a8a9ac.png) 
</details>

<details>
<summary>酉雞 Chicken</summary>

###  Blessed by the Jade Emperor with the spirit of the Rooster, you possess unwavering confidence, meticulous precision, and a touch of flamboyant charm. You are a natural leader, blessed with sharp observation skills and a strong sense of justice.


- 🌅 **Dawn's Herald**
  - Like the rooster crowing at dawn, you possess enhanced awareness and reflexes, especially at the start of each day.
- 🧐 **Meticulous Precision**
  - Your inherent attention to detail makes you a master craftsman and a keen observer.
- ⚔️ **Combative Flair**
  - You possess a unique fighting style, incorporating swift movements and a surprising burst of strength when using swords.
- 🚀 **Grounding Ascent**
  - Your grounding and ability to rise to any occasion empowers you to jump higher.
- 😠 **Dust Bath Aversion**
  - As the rooster is always vigilant, the sound of dust angers you.
- 🌑 **Nighttime Vulnerability**
  - The darkness diminishes your natural confidence and alertness.
- ✨ **Zodiac Power**
  - You have particles around.
![Rooster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7Wm0608/images/1154735314b7a7a17fdef2d5e9cc89e76ff7111f.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>戌狗 Dog</summary>

###  Born under the sign of the Dog in the Chinese Zodiac, you embody loyalty, honesty, and a strong sense of justice. You are a steadfast friend and protector, always vigilant and ready to defend those you care for.


- 🤝 **Unwavering Loyalty**
  - You are fiercely loyal to your allies, and gain bonuses when near them.
- 🦉 **Night Watch**
  - Your senses are heightened at night, allowing you to see and stronger at night.
- 👁️ **Honest Heart**
  - You are immune to the effects of illusions.
- ✨ **Zodiac Power**
  - You have particles around.
![Dog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7Wm0608/images/aff9fbddb3579e12fcb464aa23e0af40e515a6f4.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>亥豬 Pig</summary>

###  Born under the sign of the Pig, you are known for your kindness, generosity, and good fortune. You have a strong sense of justice and a natural talent for attracting wealth and abundance.


- 💰 **Golden Touch**
  - You have a natural affinity for wealth and good fortune.
- ✨ **Generous Spirit**
  - Your innate generosity extends to those around you, granting blessings to nearby allies.
- 🛡️ **Fortitude**
  - You also have the 'Resistance' effect permanently.
- 🚀 **Unwavering Resolve**
  - Your determination is unmatched, allowing you to push through fatigue. You gain the 'Haste' effect permanently. You also recover from the 'Mining Fatigue' effect three times faster.
- 😋 **Greedy Appetite**
  - You have a greater hunger for knowledge and food.  You gain more experience and require more food to sustain yourself.
- ✨ **Zodiac Power**
  - You have particles around.
![Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7Wm0608/images/7d4d7489ccb39a67f7743c79282311b1244b8e26.png)
</details>
